templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us at a store near you here: https://shopzimba.com/pages/store-locator

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! You can sign up for our ambassador program here: https://zimbapartner.com/join#how-to-join

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that, but our deals will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: I can check if that's possible. What's the order number, email address and the change you'd like to make?

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: The best way to discuss wholesale is to contact us via this page: https://shopzimba.com/pages/wholesale Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: We have a rewards/referral program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here - https://shopzimba.com/pages/rewards

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at +1 (833) 420-1876 or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Social Media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/zimbawhitening/?hl=en and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/zimbawhitening

templates.name: Do these work on fillings, bondings, crowns, or veneers?
templates.content: Our products work best on your natural teeth. Those with partial bonding or fillings may experience some whitening effects, however, the results may not be as drastic as they'll be on your natural teeth. They also won't whiten veneers.

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here - https://shopzimba.com/pages/terms-and-conditions

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: We usually ship via USPS, DHL or Asendia and once shipped, it will take 4-6 business days domestically and 10-20 business days internationally.

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at help@shopzimba.com or call us toll free at +1 (833) 420-1876 (M-F 9:30am-6:00pm EST). Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Retroactive Discount
templates.content: We're only able to retroactively apply a discount if you tried using the code before completing your order ran into issues. Do you have a screenshot you can share?

templates.name: How do I cancel my subscription?
templates.content: You can cancel a subscription at any time by logging in to your account. From the My Account page, click the Subscriptions tab to view your active and paused subscriptions. Under Actions, click Cancel for the subscription you want to cancel.

templates.name: Are your teeth going to be completely white?
templates.content: Our promise is that your teeth will be at least 2 shades whiter after using our products as directed. Most likely, they'll be a lot whiter than that, but this is the minimum we can guarantee for all different types of teeth. Sticking to good habits like avoiding excessive smoking, wine drinking, and coffee consumption also helps the effectiveness of your smile transformation.

templates.name: Are they good for sensitive teeth?
templates.content: Our whitening strips are extra gentle on sensitive teeth, enamel safe and have reduced sensitivity ingredients.

templates.name: How often/long should I use Whitening Strips for?
templates.content: For best results, it is recommended to use the Whitening Strips for 14 consecutive days. If you happen to miss a day or two, as we know life is busy, this will not affect your whitening results.

templates.name: Free Shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $50. Maybe you can add something else to reach the min?
